text:
enefits from ancestral estate & property. Old dealings will be profitable
and new ones could be acquired.
5th bhava : when dhanesh is well aspected & strong in the 5th bhava, one gets children, money
through lottery, gambling etc. One is successful in studies & can attain scholarships etc.
6th bhava : If dhanesh is well aspected and associated in the 6th bhava, then he gets service,
promotions in service and gets benefits & happiness from animals & servants.
7th bhava: Strong dhanesh in 7th bhava brings benefits from marriage & spouse. He benefits from
legal matters, gets benefits from partnership enterprise. If dhanesh is weak and afflicted then he
experiences adversities in 7th bhava matters and lots of wealth.
8th bhava : dhanesh in 8th bhava is not favorable to acquire wealth during this period, expenses
increases, wealth starts dwindling. But if there is a promise of legacy & will in the natal chart,
then one gets wealth through them.
